{{CargoRelic
|name=Enchanted Wardrobe
|class_id=20939
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=Opening this magically powered wardrobe transports you to a different world of fashion. Whether it's the romantic retro style, the elegant royal style, or the avant-garde future fashion, this magical wardrobe caters to your desires.
|fame=33
|art=19
|fth=13
|civ=12
|tech=13
|ss1=Per Minion Skin crafted, Snail ATK +10<br>Orange Minion Skins Crafted: 100/100
|ss2=Per Minion Skin crafted, Snail ATK +10<br>Orange Minion Skins Crafted: 100/100
|ss3=Per Minion Skin crafted, Snail ATK +10<br>Orange Minion Skins Crafted: 100/100
|ss4=Per Minion Skin crafted, Snail ATK +10<br>Orange Minion Skins Crafted: 100/100
|ss7=Per Minion Skin crafted, Snail ATK +10<br>Orange Minion Skins Crafted: 100/100<br> (Awakened)
}}
